lint.command: go test ./apps/backend/internal/tracking/... -count=1 -parallel 4 && go test ./apps/backend/internal/bootstrap/... -count=1 -parallel 4 && vp run test:e2e:website -- e2e/timer-page.spec.ts --workers 1

blockingIssues.description: The feature review found the fullstack commit only added browser E2E coverage and omitted the required source-doc status-block updates for the directly used timer docs.

The reviewed fullstack evidence did not include a backend-truth proof for the same cross-workspace edit/stop/current-timer scenario, so the feature does not satisfy the shared backend+browser proof contract.
The submitted commit 54b030b contains only unrelated security regression changes, while the claimed tracking doc and cross-workspace regression work was left outside the reviewed commit.
The feature did not complete the requested structural refactor because page orchestration still lives inside WorkspaceTimerPage instead of being split into a separate state/orchestration boundary.
The new VAL-CROSS-005 coverage proves selected view persistence only; it does not prove shared top-composer/header state and running-timer identity continuity across view and workspace changes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether proof-only follow-up features may skip source-doc status-block updates and backend-test additions when the implementation already exists, or keep the current requirements and strengthen enforcement.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `cross-workspace-running-header` passed worker completion with only Playwright test changes even though the skill requires doc-block updates and one shared backend+browser proof path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen enforcement or review checks around mandatory agent-browser replay and canonical vp-only JS tool usage in frontend worker runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `shared-timer-page-state-and-view-preference` reported followedProcedure true despite no agent-browser invocation and transcript use of npx formatting commands outside the canonical vp toolchain.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit end-of-run verification step that the handoff commit diff matches the files and behavior claimed in the worker handoff before EndFeatureRun succeeds.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `global-running-timer-contract-and-regressions` handed off commit 54b030b while the claimed doc/regression changes were not in that commit.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a services.yaml formatting command for ad hoc prettier/biome use.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected because the repo guidance already says JS/TS toolchain commands should go through canonical vp entrypoints rather than expanding alternate command surfaces.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document reviewer advice to always compare the working tree against the handoff commit.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as a library update because it is procedural reviewer guidance better handled in skill/orchestrator instructions than in factual codebase knowledge.
